heading: Study by Secretary of Agriculture when International Trade Commission begins investigation
label: 2401c Study by Secretary of Agriculture when International Trade Commission begins investigation
notes: Termination of AssistanceFor termination of assistance under this part after , see Termination Date note below.June 30, 2022

Termination DateExcept as otherwise provided, technical assistance and financial assistance may not be provided under this part after , see , as modified by , set out as notes preceding .June 30, 2022section 285 of Pub. L. 93–618section 406(a)(7) of Pub. L. 114–27section 2271 of this title

children.text: the number of agricultural commodity producers producing a like or directly competitive agricultural commodity who have been or are likely to be certified as eligible for adjustment assistance under this part, and
the extent to which the adjustment of such producers to the import competition may be facilitated through the use of existing programs.

children.heading: Report
children.label: b Report
children.text: Not later than 15 days after the day on which the Commission makes its report under , the Secretary shall submit a report to the President setting forth the findings of the study described in subsection (a). Upon making the report to the President, the Secretary shall also promptly make the report public (with the exception of information which the Secretary determines to be confidential) and shall have a summary of the report published in the Federal Register.section 2252(f) of this title
